title: Grenade-round projectile spawn POSITION read from raw hand+0x2E8 — 12 bytes off on native (field_B58 @0x2F4)
repro: gun.c:4819 passes (coord3d*)((u8*)hand+0x2E8) as arg1 of sub_GAME_7F05EC1C; retail = hand+0x2E8 (per-hand stride INTACT here, only the intra-hand offset is stale) = field_B58; native offsetof(struct hand, field_B58) = 0x2F4 (+0xC: pad-to-8 before audioHandle + two 4->8B pointer growths), so the raw read hits field_B4C/B50/B54 (three s32s) reinterpreted as coord3d

history.note: Sibling of FID-0085 (same function sub_GAME_7F05F73C, position half), reviewer-confirmed numbers. Masking: sub_GAME_7F05EC1C (gun.c:4070-4085) LOS-tests player->arg1 and falls back to player_prop->pos on failure — but garbage arg1->y feeds the height window BEFORE the test (gun.c:4060-4066), and when blocked the garbage is memcpy'd into projectile->unkd4 (gun.c:4099-4102). Fix should mirror FID-0085's idiom (&hand->field_B58) and add a field_B58 lock to test_struct_layout. Last remaining raw (u8*)hand+0x... read in live gun.c.
